description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house with a predominantly white exterior and large glass windows, featuring a spacious terrace bordered by a blue-tinted glass railing. The terrace is equipped with outdoor furniture, including lounge chairs and a dining set, and is surrounded by a low red-brick wall. The house has multiple large windows and sliding glass doors, providing ample natural light to the interior. A tree and some landscaping elements are present near the house, adding greenery to the urban setting. The roofline is a mix of flat and slightly angled sections, with visible ventilation and utility structures. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern white house with a flat roof, expansive glass windows, and a large terrace with blue glass railings and red-brick walls, featuring outdoor furniture and landscaping.
description_view_0: Side view showing the terrace with blue glass railings, red-brick wall, and outdoor furniture, as well as the white facade and rooftop details.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entry, large windows, vertical slats, and a tree adjacent to the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the terrace's full length, outdoor dining area, and the open-plan interior visible through large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite front view focusing on the terrace with lounge chairs, large sliding glass doors, and the symmetrical roofline.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a large glass door, vertical metal slats, and minimalistic design with no porch or overhang.
